description_long: This adult male figure is depicted standing upright with a neutral posture, arms relaxed at his sides. He is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve shirt featuring horizontal stripes and a pair of straight-cut trousers secured with a belt. The shirt is tucked into the pants, giving a tidy, casual appearance suitable for urban environments. His shoes are simple and dark, complementing the overall outfit. The figure has short, neatly groomed hair and a mustache, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits well and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright, wearing a striped collared shirt, trousers, and dark shoes, with short hair and a mustache.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, belt, and facial features including a mustache.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the straight fit of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and the overall fit of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut trousers with a belt
